## Verification

- [ ] I ran `./scripts/validate-repository.sh`.
- [ ] I added or updated tests/evidence, or explained why none applies.
- [ ] I used only synthetic data in tests, screenshots, logs, and fixtures.

## Trust review

- [ ] No saved text, clipboard content, typed prefixes, selections, paths, URLs, credentials, signing material, or personal data is committed.
- [ ] This does not add a network request, analytics, crash upload, remote configuration, plug-in, or downloaded-code path.
- [ ] This does not change permissions, entitlements, signing, storage, encryption, retention, exclusions, diagnostics, insertion, or secure-field behavior.

If either trust statement is unchecked, explain the change, threat-model/test IDs, user-facing copy, fallback, and rollback plan:
